who: billing teams at medical clinics processing 10-20 claims/month
offer: For billing teams at medical clinics processing 10-20 claims/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of insurance claims leading to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing teams seeking help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to billing teams with demo video
Community forums where billing teams share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of claims data and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
